title: Instruction Preference Pairs
description: Create side-by-side preference judgments on instruction-following responses. Contributors read a prompt and two model outputs, then choose which response is better and explain why — training RLHF reward models for frontier language models.

tasks.title: Side-by-side preference judgment
tasks.description: Read the instruction prompt and two candidate responses. Choose the better response (A or B or Tie). Write 1–2 sentences explaining your reasoning. Rate on: accuracy, helpfulness, safety, and style.

tasks.title: Agreement scoring
tasks.description: Cross-check against other annotators' judgments. Flag low-agreement items for adjudication. Compute inter-annotator Cohen's kappa.
